summary: CRITICAL: Workflow references ./New-BuildMatrix.Tests.ps1 but file is not provided; workflow cannot execute. Missing test-fixtures/ directory (test1-basic.json, test2-includes.json). actions/checkout@v4 violates explicit requirement to pin actions to full-length commit SHA. PowerShell scripts lack $ErrorActionPreference='Stop' and Set-StrictMode. Run-ActTests.ps1 uses fragile regex assertions (e.g., 'matrix-size.*4') that break on JSON formatting changes. No input validation in New-BuildMatrix. Would not ship: cannot run.
